candidates.why: Explicit COGS-related amortization row is shown, but it appears as a component under the selected COGS bucket. The selected parent row 'Cost of Operating Revenue' matches the COGS total, and the visible component structure indicates these D&A amounts are embedded within that parent bucket rather than separate same-level expenses to add again.

This is an explicit COGS-related depreciation row, but it appears to be a sub-component of the selected COGS total. The values reconcile with the selected COGS bucket together with material expenses, so adding it separately would double count.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of Operating Revenue'. The statement shows a parent-total/component structure: COGS total is already inclusive of depreciation and amortization in cost of revenues.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Selected XSGA reference bucket is the SG&A excluding R&D row from the earlier mapping. No separate populated SG&A D&A line is visible above the financial section, and XRD is empty, so no SG&A D&A row should be added separately.
